title: Deterministic Telegram-origin restart routing in boot flow
summary: Ensure restart completions triggered from Telegram always route back to Telegram with restored identity metadata, eliminating wrong-channel fallback to startup/web sessions.

affectedFiles.description: Add Telegram origin metadata fields to RestartContext and persist them when storing restart context.
Resolve restart routing target deterministically and restore Telegram identity/origin before post-restart completion.

diffPreview:
- Add previousTelegramChatId/previousTelegramUserId to RestartContext in lifecycle.ts
- Persist telegramChatId/telegramUserId from session context in contextToPersist
- Import SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM in boot.ts
- Replace telegram special-case hardcode with resolvedChannel/resolvedOrigin/resolvedSessionId logic
- Force Telegram origin + restore telegram IDs before logging/setting post-restart session context
estimatedImpact: Prevents wrong-channel restart completion notifications, makes restart routing deterministic across channels, and preserves Telegram operator trust.
executorPrompt: Apply the approved source edits exactly as specified in the proposal for src/gateway/lifecycle.ts and src/gateway/boot.ts. Preserve formatting and existing behavior outside described changes. Then run npm run build to verify type safety. Report changed hunks and build result.
